pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 8, verified in export_result.sh line 6

Code analysis of gs-maven-broken project files: (1) pom.xml line 21 has invalid version 999.0.0 for joda-time, (2) HelloWorld.java line 3 imports LocaleTime (typo, should be LocalTime), (3) Greeter.java line 5 has bare return statement with no String value
GitHub search confirmed repository exists at this URL. Repository is archived as of June 7, 2024 per GitHub search results.

privileged_info_summary: The fix_build_errors task uses a synthetic project (gs-maven-broken) containing exactly 3 build errors: an invalid joda-time version (999.0.0) in pom.xml, a LocaleTime class name typo in HelloWorld.java (should be LocalTime), and a missing return value in Greeter.java's sayHello() method. The project is set up at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/gs-maven-broken and is based on the Spring Getting Started Maven guide from https://github.com/spring-attic/gs-maven.
